stemHtml: What percentages of the head wind and tail wind component are taken into account when calculating the take-off field length required?

options.a: not more than 50% head wind and not less than 100% tail wind.
options.b: not more than 50% head wind and not less than 150% tail wind.
options.d: not less than 150% head wind and not more than 50% tail wind.
